hero.pre: Est. 2025 — South Sudan's Finest Bridal Atelier
hero.titleItalic: Where every gown tells the story of a love that lasts forever.

marquee.text: Bridal Dreams ✦ Luxury Wedding Gowns ✦ Handcrafted with Love ✦ South Sudan ✦ Your Dream Dress Awaits ✦ Bridal Dreams ✦ Luxury Wedding Gowns ✦ Handcrafted with Love ✦ South Sudan ✦ Your Dream Dress Awaits

about.label: Our Story
about.titleLine2: Designs that take your breath away
about.body1: Bridal Dreams was born from a singular passion — to make every bride feel like a work of art. From the first consultation to the final fitting, we are devoted to one vision: yours.
about.body2: Each gown in our collection is sourced and curated with an obsessive attention to fabric, silhouette, and detail. We carry designs that range from timeless ivory classics to contemporary couture.
about.body3: We don't just sell dresses. We create moments that last a lifetime — from your very first appointment to the day you walk down the aisle.

collections.label: The Collection
collections.mermaidSub: Sculpted beauty from bodice to train

experience.label: The Bridal Dreams Experience
experience.privateDesc: One-on-one appointments in our intimate boutique, guided by our experienced bridal stylists.
experience.alterationsDesc: Our in-house seamstresses ensure every gown fits you perfectly, down to the last stitch.
experience.curationDesc: Handpicked gowns from the world's finest designers, available exclusively at Bridal Dreams.
experience.luxuryDesc: From freshments on arrival to personalised styling advice, every visit is an unforgettable experience.

testimonials.label: Happy Brides
testimonials.t1: I walked into Bridal Dreams with no idea what I wanted and walked out with the gown of my dreams. The team made me feel so special — they truly listened to everything I said and found me the most perfect dress.
testimonials.t2: Absolutely phenomenal experience from start to finish. The alterations were perfection — it fit like the dress was made just for me. I got so many compliments on my wedding day. Bridal Dreams is truly the best.
testimonials.t3: I was nervous about finding the right dress on a budget, but the team at Bridal Dreams made sure I never felt pressured. They found me something breathtaking. Truly a magical experience!
testimonials.t4: Professional service, beautiful gowns, and a wonderful atmosphere. I highly recommend this boutique to any bride looking for her dream dress.Thank you so much, Bridal Dreams!

booking.label: Appointments
booking.infoBody: Your bridal journey begins with a personal, unhurried appointment in our boutique. We dedicate 90 minutes exclusively to you — no crowds, no pressure, just pure bridal magic.
booking.feature3: Full access to our complete collection
booking.styleDefault: What style are you dreaming of?
booking.successMsg: Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours to confirm your fitting.

footer.desc: South Sudan's premier destination for luxury wedding gowns. Every bride deserves to feel extraordinary on her most special day.
footer.location: Bridal Dreams, opp Albino Bridge Rd, JUba South Sudan
